questions.question: Which function of money is fulfilled when you compare the price of a shirt at two different stores?
questions.Help: Money acts as a common denominator to value goods and services.

questions.question: What is the primary advantage of using a debit card over a credit card for daily purchases?
options: You build a higher credit score
You get extended warranties on purchases
questions.Help: Debit cards draw directly from your bank account, avoiding debt.

questions.question: How does inflation affect the time value of money?
options: It increases the purchasing power of current cash
It decreases the future purchasing power of money
It keeps the value of money constant over time
questions.correctAnswer: It decreases the future purchasing power of money
questions.Help: Inflation erodes the value of a dollar over time.

questions.question: If an individual has $50,000 in assets and $30,000 in liabilities, what is their net worth?
Which of the following is considered a 'fixed' expense in a personal budget?
questions.Help: Fixed expenses remain constant in amount each period.

questions.question: What is a primary distinction between a commercial bank and a credit union?
options: Commercial banks offer higher interest rates on savings
questions.Help: Credit unions are member-owned, not-for-profit entities.

questions.question: Which document should you review to determine the net pay on your earnings?
questions.Help: A pay stub details gross earnings, taxes, and net pay.

questions.question: When balancing a checkbook, what should you do if the bank statement balance differs from your register balance?
options: Assume the bank is always right
Add the difference to the bank balance
Account for outstanding checks and deposits
Delete your records and start over
questions.correctAnswer: Account for outstanding checks and deposits
questions.Help: Reconciliation involves accounting for transactions not yet cleared.

questions.question: How can an individual best protect themselves against identity theft?
options: Using the same password for all accounts
Sharing account numbers over social media
Shredding documents containing sensitive personal information
Carrying your social security card in your wallet
questions.correctAnswer: Shredding documents containing sensitive personal information
questions.Help: Physical security of documents prevents dumpster diving for data.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a 401(k) plan?
What is the primary role of an insurance deductible?
options: The amount paid by the insurance company per claim
The amount the policyholder pays before insurance coverage kicks in
The monthly cost of the insurance premium
The total coverage limit of the policy
questions.correctAnswer: The amount the policyholder pays before insurance coverage kicks in
questions.Help: Deductibles represent the insured party's out-of-pocket share.
